{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20751_1
|class_id=20751
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20751_2
|fame=16
|art=13
|fth=30
|civ=20
|tech=11
|ss1=Relic Concerting, Orange Reagent cost -10<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail ATK +20<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss2=Relic Concerting, Orange Reagent cost -10<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail ATK +40<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss3=Relic Concerting, Orange Reagent cost -10<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail ATK +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss4=Relic Concerting, Orange Reagent cost -10<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail ATK +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss7=Relic Concerting, Orange Reagent cost -10<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail ATK +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3<br> (Awakened)
}}
